rules.rule_text:
rule FE_APT_9002_rat
{
	meta:
		author = "FireEye Labs"
		reference = "https://www.fireeye.com/blog/threat-research/2013/11/operation-ephemeral-hydra-ie-zero-day-linked-to-deputydog-uses-diskless-method.html"

	strings:
		$mz = {4d 5a}
		$a = "rat_UnInstall" wide ascii

	condition:
		($mz at 0 ) and $a
}
